parameters.query: INSERT INTO processed_user_metrics (user_id, name, email, city, company, total_posts) VALUES ({{$json.user_id}}, {{$json.name}}, {{$json.email}}, {{$json.city}}, {{$json.company}}, {{$json.total_posts}}) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name, email = EXCLUDED.email, city = EXCLUDED.city, company = EXCLUDED.company, total_posts = EXCLUDED.total_posts, processed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
